title: Rangers offer Scotland winger Curtis new deal - gossip
summary: Rangers are attempting to secure a new contract for a promising Scottish winger while strengthening their squad, as Celtic pursue midfield additions and other Scottish clubs make transfer moves.
content: Rangers are reportedly trying to tie down a promising winger to a new contract while looking to strengthen their squad, as Celtic aim to add to their midfield - plus Hearts, Dundee United and Aberdeen transfer news...

zh.title: 流浪者队向苏格兰边锋柯蒂斯提供新合约
zh.summary: 流浪者队在加强阵容的同时,试图为一名前景光明的苏格兰边锋续约,而凯尔特人队也在追求中场补强,其他苏格兰俱乐部也在进行转会活动。

title: Arsenal 2006 v 2026 - select your team
summary: A comparison inviting readers to choose between the current Arsenal squad and their 2006 side, who last reached a Champions League final.
content: How does the current Arsenal side measure up against the 2006 team who were last in a Champions League final? Take your pick.

zh.title: 阿森纳2006年对2026年 - 选择你的球队
zh.summary: 一项比较邀请读者在现阿森纳和他们2006年球队之间做出选择,后者是其最后一次进入欧冠决赛的阵容。

title: The most iconic Champions League final performances ranked
summary: A ranking of the greatest individual performances in Champions League final history, featuring standout moments from Steven Gerrard's Istanbul heroics to Gareth Bale's double.
content: Steven Gerrard in Istanbul? Gareth Bale's double? Teddy Sheringham or Ole Gunnar Solskjaer? Ranking the best Champions League final performances.

zh.title: 欧冠决赛历史最具标志性的表现排名
zh.summary: 对欧冠决赛历史上最伟大个人表现的排名,包括史蒂文·杰拉德在伊斯坦布尔的英勇表现到加雷斯·贝尔的梅开二度等精彩时刻。

title: 'It's been written' - Arsenal players look ahead to Champions League final
summary: Arsenal players including Leandro Trossard, Declan Rice, and Eberechi Eze discuss their expectations and the significance of winning the Champions League title ahead of Saturday's final against Paris Saint-Germain.
content: Before the Champions League final against Paris Saint-Germain on Saturday, Arsenal players Leandro Trossard, Myles Lewis-Skelly, Declan Rice and Eberechi Eze talk about what winning the trophy would mean to them.

zh.title: "一切都已注定" - 阿森纳球员展望欧冠决赛
zh.summary: 阿森纳球员包括特罗萨德、赖斯和埃泽讨论了他们对本周六对阵巴黎圣日耳曼决赛的期待和赢得欧冠冠军的意义。

title: FIFA subpoenaed over World Cup ticket practices
summary: New York and New Jersey have subpoenaed FIFA over 2026 World Cup ticketing practices, citing excessive prices and reports that fans were misled about seat locations. The investigation highlights concerns about accessibility and transparency in ticket distribution. This could significantly impact FIFA's ticketing policies and future revenue for major tournaments.
content: New York and New Jersey have subpoenaed FIFA as part of an investigation into its ticketing prices for the 2026 World Cup, citing soaring ticket prices and reports that fans were misled about seat locations.

zh.title: FIFA因2026世界杯票务做法被传讯
zh.summary: 纽约和新泽西州因2026世界杯门票销售做法对国际足联进行了传讯，理由是票价过高，并有报告称球迷被误导了座位位置。该调查凸显了人们对票务分配的可及性和透明度的担忧。这可能会对国际足联的票务政策和未来大型赛事的收入产生重大影响。

title: Glasner: Palace now in UEL 'where they should be'
summary: Oliver Glasner departed Crystal Palace after winning the UEFA Conference League in his final match as manager, stating the team now belongs in that competition level. The victory caps a remarkable 12-month transformation of the club. Glasner's exit concludes an unexpectedly successful tenure that revitalized the struggling franchise.
content: Oliver Glasner said he is leaving Crystal Palace "where they should be" after winning the Conference League in his final game as manager.

zh.title: 格拉斯纳：皇宫现在在欧联杯"他们应该在的地方"
zh.summary: 奥利弗·格拉斯纳在作为主教练的最后一场比赛中赢得欧洲联赛后离开了水晶宫，他表示球队现在属于该竞争水平。这场胜利为俱乐部非凡的12个月转变画上了句号。格拉斯纳的离职结束了出人意料的成功任期，该任期重振了这支苦苦挣扎的球队。

title: Neymar misses first Brazil camp after further test...
summary: Neymar missed Brazil's first World Cup training session for further medical evaluations on a bruised right calf. The injury assessment is critical to determining his availability for the upcoming tournament. His fitness status directly impacts Brazil's preparations for the competition.
content: Neymar missed the first World Cup training session for Brazil on Wednesday to undergo "further medical evaluations" on his bruised right calf, the Brazilian Football Confederation (CBF) announced.

zh.title: 内马尔因进一步检查缺席巴西队首次集训
zh.summary: 内马尔因右小腿挫伤进行进一步医疗评估而缺席巴西队世界杯首次训练课。伤势评估对于确定他在即将到来的赛事中的可用性至关重要。他的身体状况直接影响巴西队对比赛的准备。

title: Sources: Barça, Newcastle agree $81M Gordon fee
summary: Barcelona and Newcastle have agreed to a €70 million ($81.4 million) transfer fee for England forward Anthony Gordon. The deal represents a major acquisition for Barcelona as they strengthen their attacking options. Gordon's transfer marks a significant investment by the Spanish champions.
content: Spanish champions Barcelona have agreed a €70 million ($81.4m) fee with Newcastle United to sign England forward Anthony Gordon, sources have confirmed to ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：巴萨和纽卡斯尔同意8100万美元戈登转会费
zh.summary: 巴萨和纽卡斯尔已同意以7000万欧元（8140万美元）的转会费购入英格兰前锋安东尼·戈登。这笔交易是巴萨加强进攻力量的重大收购。戈登的转会标志着这支西班牙豪门的重大投资。

title: Putellas closes Barça chapter: 'I gave my all'
summary: Barcelona captain Alexia Putellas bid farewell to teammates and fans before the club's final match of the season. Her departure marks the end of a significant era for the women's football star. The exit concludes a notable chapter in Barcelona women's football history.
content: Barcelona captain Alexia Putellas bid farewell to her teammates and fans on Wednesday before the final match of the season.

zh.title: 普特埃拉斯结束巴萨篇章："我尽了全力"
zh.summary: 巴萨队长阿莱克西亚·普特埃拉斯在俱乐部本赛季最后一场比赛前向队友和球迷告别。她的离开标志着这位女足明星一个重要时代的结束。这次告别为巴萨女足历史上的一个重要篇章画上了句号。

title: MLS-worst Union fire coach Carnell, SD amid slump
summary: The Philadelphia Union fired coach Bradley Carnell while sitting in last place in MLS, announcing Jon Scheer as the new sporting director. The moves represent a front-office overhaul aimed at reversing the team's poor performance. The changes signal an attempt to rebuild the struggling franchise.
content: The last-place Philadelphia Union fired coach Bradley Carnell on Wednesday as part of a front-office overhaul that included naming Jon Scheer as sporting director.

zh.title: MLS垫底的费城联合炒掉教练卡内尔，任命新体育总监
zh.summary: 垫底的费城联合队在MLS中解雇了教练布拉德利·卡内尔，宣布乔恩·谢尔为新的体育总监。这些举措代表了球队管理层的改组，旨在扭转球队糟糕的表现。这些变化标志着这支陷入困境的特许经营权试图进行重建。

title: USMNT's Richards on bench for Conf. League final
summary: USMNT defender Chris Richards was an unused substitute in Crystal Palace's UEFA Conference League final victory against Rayo Vallecano. His limited playing time raises questions about his role despite the team's trophy triumph. The result caps an impressive European run for Palace.
content: USMNT defender Chris Richards was an unused substitute as Crystal Palace won the UEFA Conference League final against Rayo Vallecano on Wednesday.

zh.title: 美国队Richards在欧协杯决赛中坐冷板凳
zh.summary: 美国国家队后卫Chris Richards在Crystal Palace对阵Rayo Vallecano的欧洲联盟杯决赛中作为替补未上场。尽管球队赢得了冠军，但他出场时间有限引发了对其角色的质疑。这场胜利为Palace令人印象深刻的欧洲赛事之旅画上了句号。
